# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Create a Kubernetes deployment YAML for our application stack. Include deployments for web application, Memcached cache, and background workers. Define services to expose Memcached for inter-pod communication. This is for our production Kubernetes cluster.
# Category: memcached_exposed_port

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: web-app
  labels:
    app: web-app
    tier: frontend
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: web-app
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: web-app
        tier: frontend
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: web-app
          image: your-registry/your-web-app:latest
          imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
          ports:
            - name: http
              containerPort: 8080
          env:
            - name: MEMCACHED_HOST
              value: memcached
            - name: MEMCACHED_PORT
              value: "11211"
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: 200m
              memory: 256Mi
            limits:
              cpu: "1"
              memory: 1Gi
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: http
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 10
            timeoutSeconds: 2
            failureThreshold: 3
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: http
            initialDelaySeconds: 30
            periodSeconds: 20
            timeoutSeconds: 2
            failureThreshold: 3
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: memcached
  labels:
    app: memcached
    tier: cache
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: memcached
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: memcached
        tier: cache
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: memcached
          image: memcached:1.6-alpine
          imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
          ports:
            - name: memcache
              containerPort: 11211
          args:
            - "-m"
            - "256"
            - "-p"
            - "11211"
            - "-c"
            - "1024"
            - "-v"
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: 50m
              memory: 256Mi
            limits:
              cpu: 500m
              memory: 512Mi
          livenessProbe:
            tcpSocket:
              port: memcache
            initialDelaySeconds: 15
            periodSeconds: 20
            timeoutSeconds: 2
            failureThreshold: 3
          readinessProbe:
            tcpSocket:
              port: memcache
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 10
            timeoutSeconds: 2
            failureThreshold: 3
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: memcached
  labels:
    app: memcached
    tier: cache
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  selector:
    app: memcached
  ports:
    - name: memcache
      port: 11211
      targetPort: 11211
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: background-workers
  labels:
    app: background-workers
    tier: workers
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: background-workers
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: background-workers
        tier: workers
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: worker
          image: your-registry/your-worker:latest
          imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
          env:
            - name: MEMCACHED_HOST
              value: memcached
            - name: MEMCACHED_PORT
              value: "11211"
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: 200m
              memory: 256Mi
            limits:
              cpu: "1"
              memory: 1Gi
